message.CONTENT_EN: To facilitate the holding of the 2026-2027 Hong Kong Road Cycling Race on 5 April 2026 (Sunday), temporary road closures will be implemented at Ngo Shan Road, Sai Kung: - The section of Fei Ngo Shan Road from its junction with the access road to Fei Ngo Shan Road house number 19 to a point about 3 kilometres north of the same junction will be temporarily closed from 6.00 am to 11.00 am. During the road closure period of Ngo Shan Road, Sai Kung (i. e. from 6.00 am to 11.00 am on 5 April 2026), all vehicular traffic (except emergency vehicles) will be prohibited to enter Ngo Shan Road, Sai Kung, until the reopening of the road. Appropriate traffic signs will be erected on site to guide motorists. Other temporary road and traffic control measures, including adjusting the extent of road closures, may be implemented by the Police at short notice depending on the actual traffic conditions. The TD appeals to the public to pay attention to the temporary road closures. Members of the public who plan to go to the affected areas should plan their journey in advance, allow sufficient travelling time to avoid unexpected delay. Motorists and public should exercise patience and follow the instructions of the Police on-site.
message.CONTENT_CN: 為配合2026年4月5日(星期日)舉行的2026-2027全港公路單車賽，當局將於活動期間在西貢飛鵝山道實施以下臨時封路安排： -飛鵝山道由其與通往飛鵝山道門牌19號的通道交界處起至同一交界以北約3公里處止的路段將上午6時至上午11時臨時封閉。 西貢飛鵝山道封路期間（即2026年4月5日上午6時至上午11時），所有車輛（緊急車輛除外）不能進入西貢飛鵝山道，直至道路重開為止。有關地點將設置適當的交通標誌，指導駕駛人士。 警方會視乎現場實際路面情況而在短時間內實施其他臨時道路及交通管制措施，包括調整封路範圍。運輸署呼籲市民留意臨時封路安排並應及早計劃行程及預留額外的時間以免延誤。駕駛及公眾人士請保持忍讓，並遵從在場警務人員的指示。

message.INCIDENT_DETAIL_EN: High Speed Rail (Hong Kong Section) runs additional temporary train trips
message.INCIDENT_DETAIL_CN: 高速鐵路(香港段)加開臨時列車車次
message.CONTENT_EN: As informed by the Chinese Mainland Railway Authorities, High Speed Rail (Hong Kong Section) will add the following temporary train trips: From Hong Kong West Kowloon Station to Shenzhenbei Station: - 5 Apr: G9540 - 6 Apr: G9538 - 7 Apr: G9536, G9544 From Shenzhenbei Station to Hong Kong West Kowloon Station: - 3 Apr: G9535, G9537, G9539, G9543 From Guangzhounan Station to Hong Kong West Kowloon Station: - 3 Apr: G9541 From Hong Kong West Kowloon Station to Guangzhounan Station: - 7 Apr: G9542 Ticketing Methods: - 12306 official website (12306. cn) or mobile app - Appointed travel agents - Hong Kong West Kowloon Station • Self-service Ticket Machines: bring valid and original travel documents of all passengers; only e-payment methods are accepted (for example, contactless credit cards, WeChat Pay or Alipay) • Ticketing Counters: may require a longer waiting time Train schedules: - 12306 official website (12306. cn) or mobile app
message.CONTENT_CN: 中國內地鐵路部門通知，高速鐵路（香港段）將加開以下臨時列車車次： 由香港西九龍站前往深圳北站： -4月5日：G9540 -4月6日：G9538 -4月7日：G9536,G9544 由深圳北站前往香港西九龍站： -4月3日：G9535,G9537,G9539,G9543 由廣州南站前往香港西九龍站： -4月3日：G9541 由香港西九龍站前往廣州南站： -4月7日：G9542 購票方式： -12306官方網站（12306.cn）或手機應用程式 -指定代理 -前往香港西九龍站 •使用自助售票機：需帶備所有乘車人士的有效旅遊證件正本；只接受電子支付（如感應式信用卡、微信支付或支付寶） •使用票務櫃位：可能需要輪候較長時間 列車服務詳情： -12306官方網站（12306.cn）或手機應用程式

message.INCIDENT_DETAIL_EN: Cross-boundary Transport Services and Special Traffic Arrangements during long weekend of Easter and Ching Ming Festival
message.INCIDENT_DETAIL_CN: 復活節及清明節假期長周末期間的跨境運輸服務及特別交通安排
message.CONTENT_EN: The Transport Department (TD) anticipates that there may be a large number of cross-boundary passengers and vehicles travelling between Hong Kong and the Mainland or Macao via various land-based boundary control points (BCPs) during long weekend of Easter and Ching Ming Festival holidays (April 3 to 7). The TD urges cross-boundary travellers to plan ahead of their trips and allow sufficient travelling time. The TD has been steering local and cross-boundary public transport (PT) services operators to enhance their capacity and reserve sufficient vehicles and manpower to meet the transport needs of cross-boundary passengers during the long weekend of Easter and Ching Ming Festival holidays. It is anticipated that the waiting time for PT services, including the Hong Kong-Zhuhai-Macao Bridge (HZMB) shuttle bus (Gold Bus) and local franchised bus “B” routes connecting various land-based BCPs, may be longer during peak periods of cross-boundary travel. Passengers should avoid travelling during peak hours, observe order while queuing and heed advice from on-site Police and staff of the PT operators. Passengers intending to take cross-boundary coaches are also advised to reserve their coach tickets in advance. Motorists of cross-boundary private cars crossing the border are advised that, subject to actual traffic conditions, special traffic arrangements may be implemented at Lok Ma Chau Control Point and Shenzhen Bay Port during the long weekend of Easter and Ching Ming Festival holidays to secure smooth access for PT vehicles to the above BCPs. Cross-boundary private cars may experience longer waiting times when crossing the BCPs during the peak periods. Motorists should pay extra attention to variable message signs and traffic signs along the approach roads to the BCPs. In case of traffic congestion, they should remain patient and follow the instructions of on-site Police. For the HZMB, to plan their journeys ahead, members of the public can make use of the TD’s HKeMobility mobile app or website (hkemobility. gov. hk/en/traffic-information/live/cctv) to access snapshots of traffic conditions at inbound and outbound vehicle plazas of the HZMB Hong Kong Port. They can also check the real-time situations of the vehicle clearance plaza of the Zhuhai Port through the WeChat official accounts “hzmbzhport” or “zhuhaifabu” (traffic-info. gzazhka. com:5015/#/) (Chinese only). Moreover, motorists are reminded to always comply with the traffic control measures implemented by the Zhuhai authority when driving on the HZMB Main Bridge. Vehicles must not occupy the emergency lane unless instructed by the Zhuhai authority. Residents and visitors may visit “Easy Boundary” (www. sb. gov. hk/eng/bwt/status. html?type=outbound), a one-stop information platform on immigration clearance launched by the Security Bureau, or the HKeMobility to obtain useful information, including the respective average waiting time for passengers and private cars at land-based BCPs, as well as for the Gold Bus, the Lok Ma Chau-Huanggang cross-boundary shuttle bus (Yellow Bus) and MTR to plan their trips and save waiting time. Members of the public are advised to check the latest traffic news through radio, the television broadcasts, the TD’s website (www. td. gov. hk) and the HKeMobility.
message.CONTENT_CN: 運輸署預計在復活節及清明節假期長周末期間（四月三日至七日）可能出現大量跨境人士及車輛經各陸路口岸往來香港和內地或澳門。運輸署呼籲跨境出行人士及早規劃行程，預留充裕交通時間。 運輸署已督導本地及跨境公共運輸服務營辦商（營辦商），在復活節及清明節假期長周末期間加大運力，預留足夠車輛及人手以應對跨境人士的出行需求。運輸署預計公共運輸服務（包括港珠澳大橋穿梭巴士（金巴）及連接各陸路管制站的本地專營巴士「B」線）在跨境人流高峰時段的等候時間或會較長，乘客應避免於繁忙時段出行。候車期間遵守秩序，並遵從現場警務人員及營辦商職員的指示。計劃乘坐跨境巴士的人士亦應提早預訂車票。 駕駛跨境私家車出入境人士請注意，視乎現場交通情況，落馬洲管制站及深圳灣口岸在復活節及清明節假期長周末期間或會實施特別交通安排，以便保障公共運輸車輛能暢順前往上述口岸，跨境私家車或需輪候通過口岸。駕駛人士請特別留意前往口岸道路沿途的可變信息顯示屏及交通標誌。如遇交通受阻，請保持忍讓及遵從現場警務人員的指示。 至於港珠澳大橋，市民可透過運輸署流動應用程式「香港出行易」或網頁（hkemobility.gov.hk/tc/traffic-information/live/cctv），查閱大橋香港口岸出境及入境客車通關廣場的交通快拍，亦可透過「港珠澳大橋珠海口岸」或「珠海發布」微信公眾號內的「大橋口岸實時通關」服務（traffic-info.gzazhka.com:5015/#/），查閱大橋珠海口岸的車輛實時通關情況，以便及早計劃行程。此外，運輸署提醒駕駛人士於大橋主橋行駛時，應時刻遵照珠海當局實施的交通管控措施，除非獲珠海市當局指示，否則車輛一律不可佔用應急車道。 市民和旅客可透過保安局的一站式過關資訊平台「口岸通」（www.sb.gov.hk/chi/bwt/status.html?type=outbound）或「香港出行易」，取得各陸路口岸旅客和私家車過關平均輪候時間，以及金巴、落馬洲—皇崗過境穿梭巴士（皇巴）及港鐵服務的平均輪候時間等有用資訊，以便計劃行程及減省等候時間。市民請留意電台、電視台、運輸署網頁（www.td.gov.hk）及「香港出行易」發放的最新交通消息。

message.CONTENT_EN:
A new train timetable of HSR will take effect from 15 April 2026. You may check the latest train information on the HSR website (timetable) or mobile app.
To facilitate the timetable adjustment, ticket sales for some train trips will be slightly deferred. For the latest ticketing arrangements and ticket purchase, please visit the 12306 official website (12306. cn) or mobile app.
message.CONTENT_CN:
新的高速鐵路列車時間表將於2026年4月15日起生效。你可瀏覽高速鐵路網頁(時間表)或手機應用程式，查閱最新列車資訊。
為配合時間表調整，部分列車車票的開售時間將稍為延後。你可透過12306官方網站(12306.cn)或手機應用程式購票，並留意車票開售情況。

message.CONTENT_EN: Amber Rainstorm Warning Signal is in force. Due to wet weather and slippery roads, Transport Department appeals motorists and the commuters to: i. plan the journey in advance; ii. allow more traveling time; iii. drive with extra care and patience; and iv. take heed of traffic situation particularly at busy junctions with obstructive views.
message.CONTENT_CN: 黃色暴雨警告信號現已生效，天雨路滑，運輸署呼籲駕駛人士及乘客須: i.提早計劃行程路線； ii.預留充裕時間出門； iii.小心駕駛及保持忍讓；及 iv.留意交通情況，特别在視線受阻的繁忙路口。

message.CONTENT_EN: Amber Rainstorm Warning Signal is in force. Due to wet weather and slippery roads, Transport Department appeals motorists and the commuters to: i. plan the journey in advance; ii. allow more traveling time; iii. drive with extra care and patience; and iv. take heed of traffic situation particularly at busy junctions with obstructive views.
message.CONTENT_CN: 黃色暴雨警告信號現已生效，天雨路滑，運輸署呼籲駕駛人士及乘客須: i.提早計劃行程路線； ii.預留充裕時間出門； iii.小心駕駛及保持忍讓；及 iv.留意交通情況，特别在視線受阻的繁忙路口。

message.INCIDENT_DETAIL_EN: Cross-boundary Travel related Arrangements / Notes during Ching Ming Festival and Easter holidays period
message.INCIDENT_DETAIL_CN: 清明節/復活節假期跨境陸路口岸出行的有關安排/注意事項
message.CONTENT_EN: The Transport Department (TD) anticipates that more travellers would return to Hong Kong via land-based Boundary Control Points (BCPs) tomorrow and the day after (6 & 7 April 2026). The TD appeals to these inbound travellers to plan ahead their journeys and be patient as it is anticipated that the demand for public transport services will be higher during the inbound peak period and the waiting time would be longer. The TD has instructed public transport operators to strengthen their services to meet passenger demand. The TD's Emergency Transport Coordination Centre will continue to monitor the traffic and public transport services at all land-based BCPs, and shall disseminate the latest traffic news through the TD's website (www. td. gov. hk) and “HKeMobility”. Inbound drivers using Hong Kong-Zhuhai-Macao Bridge (HZMB) are reminded to reserve sufficient travelling time and be patient in queue. The public may check the real time situations of the vehicle clearance plaza of HZMB Zhuhai Port through the “hzmbzhport” or hzhuaifabu” WeChat official accounts (https://traffic-info. gzazhka. com:5015/#/), in order to plan their journeys ahead.
message.CONTENT_CN: 運輸署預計明日及後日(2026年4月6日及7日)將有較多跨境旅客使用陸路口岸回港，運輸署呼籲有關旅客預早妥善規劃行程，在返港高峰時間的公共運輸需求會較高，乘客候車時間亦會較長，請乘客耐心等候。運輸署已指示公共運輸服務營辦商加強服務應付乘客需求。運輸署的緊急交通事故協調中心會繼續監察各陸路口岸的公共運輸服務情況，並會透過運輸署網頁（www.td.gov.hk）及流動應用程式「香港出行易」，發放最新的交通消息。 運輸署特別提醒使用港珠澳大橋珠海口岸返港的駕駛人士，預留充裕交通時間，同時在輪候時保持忍讓。市民可於開始行程前透過「港珠澳大橋珠海口岸」或「珠海發布」微信公眾號內的「大橋口岸實時通關」服務(或前往https://traffic-info.gzazhka.com:5015/#/)，查詢大橋珠海口岸的車輛實時通關情況。以便及早計劃行程。

message.LOCATION_EN: Airport Express Line, Airport Express Line, Tung Chung Line and Tung Chung Line Service Disruption
message.LOCATION_CN: 機場快綫，機場快綫，東涌綫及東涌綫服務延誤
message.CONTENT_EN: Due to signalling equipment fault near Siu Ho Wan Depot, the total journey time on Airport Express and Tung Chung Line could be extended by 15-20 minutes. The close out time of In-town Check-in service is adjusted from 90 minutes to 120 minutes.
message.CONTENT_CN: 由於小蠔灣車廠附近信號設備故障,機場快綫及東涌綫的行車時間預計需要額外15-20分鐘。市區預辦登機服務的截止時間，由航班起飛前90分鐘改為120分鐘。

message.LOCATION_EN: Airport Express Line, Airport Express Line, Tung Chung Line and Tung Chung Line Service Disruption
message.LOCATION_CN: 機場快綫，機場快綫，東涌綫及東涌綫服務延誤
message.CONTENT_EN: Due to signalling equipment fault near Siu Ho Wan Depot, the total journey time on Airport Express and Tung Chung Line could be extended by 8-10 minutes. The close out time of In-town Check-in service is adjusted from 90 minutes to 120 minutes.
message.CONTENT_CN: 由於小蠔灣車廠附近信號設備故障,機場快綫及東涌綫的行車時間預計需要額外8-10分鐘。市區預辦登機服務的截止時間，由航班起飛前90分鐘改為120分鐘。

message.LOCATION_EN: Airport Express Line, Airport Express Line, Tung Chung Line and Tung Chung Line Service Disruption
message.LOCATION_CN: 機場快綫，機場快綫，東涌綫及東涌綫服務延誤
message.CONTENT_EN: Transport Department has received notification from MTR Corporation Limited that The signalling equipment fault near Siu Ho Wan Depot has been fixed. Normal train service on the Airport Express and Tung Chung Line is gradually resuming. The close out time of In-town Check-in service is resumed to 90 minutes.
message.CONTENT_CN: 運輸署接獲港鐵公司通知， 小蠔灣車廠附近的信號設備已完成復修。機場快綫及東涌綫列車服務逐步回復正常。市區預辦登機服務的截止時間回復至航班起飛前90分鐘。

message.INCIDENT_DETAIL_EN: Busy Traffic at the vehicle clearance plaza (Hong Kong bound) of the HZMB Zhuhai Port
message.INCIDENT_DETAIL_CN: 港珠澳大橋珠海口岸(往香港方向)車輛通關廣場現時非常繁忙
message.LOCATION_EN: Busy Traffic at the vehicle clearance plaza (Hong Kong bound) of the HZMB Zhuhai Port
message.LOCATION_CN: 港珠澳大橋珠海口岸(往香港方向)車輛通關廣場現時非常繁忙
message.CONTENT_EN: The vehicle clearance plaza (Hong Kong bound) of the HZMB Zhuhai Port is very busy now. Members of the public who plan to drive their private cars back to Hong Kong via HZMB are advised to plan ahead their journeys, reserve sufficient commuting time, and be patient while queuing. The public can check the real time situation of the vehicle clearance plaza of HZMB Zhuhai Port through the WeChat official accounts “hzmbzhport” or “zhuhaifabu” (or visit https://traffic-info.gzazhka.com:5015/#/)(Chineseonly) before starting their journeys.
message.CONTENT_CN: 港珠澳大橋珠海口岸(往香港方向)的車輛通關廣場現時非常繁忙，計劃駕駛私家車經大橋返港的市民請妥善規劃行程，預留充裕交通時間，同時在輪候時保持忍讓。市民可於開始行程前透過「港珠澳大橋珠海口岸」或「珠海發布」微信公眾號內的「大橋口岸實時通關」服務(或前往https://traffic-info.gzazhka.com:5015/#/)，查詢大橋珠海口岸的車輛實時通關情況。

message.INCIDENT_DETAIL_EN: Temporary Service Adjustment of Park Island Ferry Services
message.INCIDENT_DETAIL_CN: 珀麗灣客運渡輪服務臨時調整
message.CONTENT_EN:
The following ferry services are temporarily adjusted on 9 April 2026: Park Island Transport Company Limited ‘Ma Wan – Central’ Route: - Ma Wan to Central: Sailings departing at 5:00 p. m. and 7:30 p. m. are replaced by bus services (Route NR338S) - Central to Ma Wan: Sailings departing at 5:30 p. m. and 8:00 p. m. are replaced by bus services (Route NR338S)
‘Ma Wan – Tsuen Wan’ Route: - Ma Wan to Tsuen Wan: Sailing at 8:10 a. m. is cancelled - Tsuen Wan to Ma Wan: Sailing at 8:30 a. m. is cancelled.
message.CONTENT_CN:
以下渡輪服務於2026年4月9日作出臨時調整： 珀麗灣客運有限公司 「馬灣-中環」航線： -馬灣至中環：下午5時及下午7時30分開出的班次由巴士服務(路線NR338S)代替營運 -中環至馬灣：下午5時30分及下午8時開出的班次由巴士服務(路線NR338S)代替營運
「馬灣-荃灣」航線： -馬灣至荃灣：取消上午8時10分開出的班次 -荃灣至馬灣：取消上午8時30分開出的班次。

message.INCIDENT_DETAIL_EN: Temporary Service Adjustment of Park Island Ferry Services
message.INCIDENT_DETAIL_CN: 珀麗灣客運渡輪服務臨時調整
message.CONTENT_EN: The following ferry services are temporarily adjusted on 10 April 2026: Park Island Transport Company Limited ‘Ma Wan – Central’ Route: - Ma Wan to Central: Sailings departing at 5:00 p. m. and 7:30 p. m. are replaced by bus services (Route NR338S) - Central to Ma Wan: Sailings departing at 5:30 p. m. and 8:00 p. m. are replaced by bus services (Route NR338S) ‘Ma Wan – Tsuen Wan’ Route: - Ma Wan to Tsuen Wan: Sailing at 8:10 a. m. is cancelled - Tsuen Wan to Ma Wan: Sailing at 8:30 a. m. is cancelled
message.CONTENT_CN: 以下渡輪服務於2026年4月10日作出臨時調整： 珀麗灣客運有限公司 「馬灣-中環」航線： -馬灣至中環：下午5時及下午7時30分開出的班次由巴士服務(路線NR338S)代替營運 -中環至馬灣：下午5時30分及下午8時開出的班次由巴士服務(路線NR338S)代替營運 「馬灣-荃灣」航線： -馬灣至荃灣：取消上午8時10分開出的班次 -荃灣至馬灣：取消上午8時30分開出的班次

message.CONTENT_EN: Due to fire , all lanes of Kam Tin Road (both bounds) between Fan Kam Road and Sheung Tsuen Park are closed to all traffic. Motorists are advised to use alternative routes. Traffic is busy now.
message.CONTENT_CN: 因火警，錦田公路(來回方向)介乎粉錦公路與上村公園之間的全線現已封閉。 駕駛人士請考慮改用其他道路。 現時上址交通繁忙。

message.CONTENT_EN:
Due to fire , all lanes of Kam Tin Road (both bounds) between Fan Kam Road and Sheung Tsuen Park are still being closed to all traffic.
Affected KMB routes nos. 51, 54, 251B have been diverted. For the latest service arrangement of individual bus routes, members of the public can refer to the information on the bus company's website or mobile application. Motorists are advised to use alternative routes. Traffic is busy now.
message.CONTENT_CN:
因火警，錦田公路(來回方向)介乎粉錦公路與上村公園之間的全線仍然封閉。
受影響九巴第51、54及251B號線須改道行駛。 有關個別巴士路線的最新服務情況，市民可參閱巴士公司的網頁或流動應用程式內的資訊。 駕駛人士請考慮改用其他道路。 現時上址交通繁忙。

message.CONTENT_EN: Due to fire , the one-lane-two-way traffic arrangement is being implemented on Kam Tin Road between Fan Kam Road and Sheung Tsuen Park.
message.CONTENT_CN: 因火警，錦田公路介乎粉錦公路與上村公園之間現已實施單線雙程行車措施。

message.LOCATION_CN: 通往萬宜水庫東壩的西貢萬宜路交通現時非常繁忙
message.CONTENT_EN: The Transport Department announced that the traffic on Sai Kung Man Yee Road leading to High Island Reservoir East Dam is very busy at the moment. The operator of Green Minibus Route No. 9A has strengthened its service to cater for passenger demand. Visitors are advised to plan ahead their journeys, reserve sufficient commuting time, and be patient while queuing.
message.CONTENT_CN: 運輸署表示，通往萬宜水庫東壩的西貢萬宜路交通現時非常繁忙，專線小巴第9A號線的營辦商已加強服務應對乘客需求。請遊人妥善計劃行程，預留充裕交通時間，同時在輪候時保持忍讓。

message.INCIDENT_DETAIL_CN: 珀麗灣客運渡輪服務臨時調整
message.CONTENT_EN:
The following ferry services are temporarily adjusted on 13 April 2026: Park Island Transport Company Limited ‘Ma Wan - Central’ Route: -Ma Wan to Central: Sailings departing at 5:00 p. m. and 7:30 p. m. are replaced by bus services (Route NR338S) -Central to Ma Wan: Sailings departing at 5:30 p. m. and 8:00 p. m. are replaced by bus services (Route NR338S)
‘Ma Wan - Tsuen Wan’ Route: -Ma Wan to Tsuen Wan: Sailing at 8:10 a. m. is cancelled -Tsuen Wan to Ma Wan: Sailing at 8:30 a. m. is cancelled
message.CONTENT_CN:
以下渡輪服務於2026年4⽉13⽇作出臨時調整：。 珀麗灣客運有限公司 「⾺灣-中環」航線： -⾺灣⾄中環：下午5時及下午7時30分開出的班次由巴⼠服務(路線NR338S)代替營運 -中環⾄⾺灣：下午5時30分及下午8時開出的班次由巴⼠服務(路線NR338S)代替營運
「⾺灣-荃灣」航線： -⾺灣⾄荃灣：取消上午8時10分開出的班次 -荃灣⾄⾺灣：取消上午8時30分開出的班次
3.

message.CONTENT_EN: Due to watermain burst , part of the lanes of Tung Tau Tsuen Road (both bounds) near Shatin Pass Road is closed to all traffic. Only remaining lane is available to motorists. Affected KMB bus routes resume to their original routeings.
message.CONTENT_CN: 因水管爆裂，東頭村道(來回方向)近沙田㘭道的部份行車線現已封閉。 駕駛人士只可使用餘下行車線行車。 受影響九巴路線恢復原有路線行駛。

message.CONTENT_EN: The one-lane-two-way traffic arrangement which was implemented on Repulse Bay Road near Repulse Bay Beach due to vehicle breakdown is now cancelled.
message.CONTENT_CN: 較早前因車輛故障而於淺水灣道近淺水灣泳灘實施的單線雙程行車措施現已取消。

message.CONTENT_EN: Due to traffic accident , part of the lanes of Shek Mun Interchange is closed to all traffic. Only remaining lane is available to motorists. Traffic is busy now.
message.CONTENT_CN: 因交通意外，石門交匯處的部份行車線現已封閉。 駕駛人士只可使用餘下行車線行車。 現時上址交通繁忙。

message.CONTENT_EN: Due to vehicle breakdown , the slow lane of Lantau Link (Tsing Ma Bridge) (Kowloon bound) is closed to all traffic. Only remaining lanes are available to motorists. Traffic is busy now.

message.CONTENT_EN: West Kowloon Highway (Western Harbour Crossing bound) near Nam Cheong MTR Station is busy. Motorists passing through the above road section(s) are advised to drive with utmost care and patience.
message.CONTENT_CN: 西九龍公路(往西區海底隧道方向)近南昌港鐵站的交通繁忙。 駕駛人士行經上述路段敬請忍讓及小心駕駛。

message.CONTENT_EN: Traffic at West Kowloon Highway (Western Harbour Crossing bound) near Nam Cheong MTR Station has resumed normal.
message.CONTENT_CN: 西九龍公路(往西區海底隧道方向)近南昌港鐵站的交通現已恢復正常。

message.CONTENT_EN: Due to vehicle breakdown , the only lane of the slip road leading from Aberdeen Praya Road (Wah Fu Estate bound) to Aberdeen Main Road is closed to all traffic. Motorists are advised to use alternative routes. Traffic is busy now.
message.CONTENT_CN: 因車輛故障，由香港仔海傍道(往華富邨方向)通往香港仔大道 的支路的唯一行車線現已封閉。 駕駛人士請考慮改用其他道路。 現時上址交通繁忙。

message.CONTENT_EN: Due to vehicle breakdown , the only lane of the slip road leading from Aberdeen Praya Road (Wah Fu Estate bound) to Aberdeen Main Road is still being closed to all traffic. Motorists are advised to use alternative routes. Affected Citybus routes nos. 70P, 94A, 95C, 98 and 595 have been diverted. For the latest service arrangement of individual bus routes, members of the public can refer to the information on the bus company's website or mobile application. Traffic is busy now.
message.CONTENT_CN: 因車輛故障，由香港仔海傍道(往華富邨方向)通往香港仔大道 的支路的唯一行車線仍然封閉。駕駛人士請考慮改用其他道路。 受影響城巴第70P、94A、95C、98及595號線須改道行駛。有關個別巴士路線的最新服務情況，市民可參閱巴士公司的網頁或流動應用程式內的資訊。 現時上址交通繁忙。

message.CONTENT_EN: The only lane of the slip road leading from Aberdeen Praya Road (Wah Fu Estate bound) to Aberdeen Main Road which was closed due to vehicle breakdown is re-opened to all traffic. Affected bus routes gradually resume to their original routeings.
message.CONTENT_CN: 較早前因車輛故障而封閉的由香港仔海傍道(往華富邨方向)通往香港仔大道 的支路的 唯一行車線現已解封。 受影響巴士路線陸續恢復原有路線行駛。

message.CONTENT_EN: Due to traffic accident , the slow lane of Tuen Mun Road (Kowloon bound) near Siu Hong MTR Station is closed to all traffic. Only remaining lanes are available to motorists. Traffic is busy now.
message.CONTENT_CN: 因交通意外，屯門公路(往九龍方向)近兆康港鐵站的慢線現已封閉。 駕駛人士只可使用餘下行車線行車。 現時上址交通繁忙。

message.CONTENT_EN: The slow lane of Tuen Mun Road (Kowloon bound) near Siu Hong MTR Station which was closed due to traffic accident is re-opened to all traffic.
message.CONTENT_CN: 較早前因交通意外而封閉的屯門公路(往九龍方向)近兆康港鐵站的慢線現已解封。

message.CONTENT_EN: Due to traffic accident , the only lane of the slip road leading from Tolo Highway (Fanling bound) to Tat Wan Road (Tai Po (South) bound) is closed to all traffic. Motorists are advised to use alternative routes. Traffic is busy now.
message.CONTENT_CN: 因交通意外，由吐露港公路(往粉嶺方向)通往達運道(往大埔(南)方向) 的支路 的唯一行車線現已封閉。 駕駛人士請考慮改用其他道路。 現時上址交通繁忙。

message.CONTENT_EN: The only lane of the slip road leading from Tolo Highway (Fanling bound) to Tat Wan Road (Tai Po (South) bound) which was closed due to traffic accident is re-opened to all traffic.
message.CONTENT_CN: 較早前因交通意外而封閉的由吐露港公路(往粉嶺方向)通往達運道(往大埔(南)方向) 的支路 的 唯一行車線現已解封。

message.CONTENT_EN: Due to malfunction of traffic lights at the junction of Kwun Tong Road and Lai Yip Street, motorists are advised to drive with utmost care when passing through the road junctions, pay extra attention to the traffic signs and safety of pedestrians. Pedestrians please pay attention to vehicles when crossing junctions with malfunctioned traffic lights. Traffic is busy now.
message.CONTENT_CN: 由於觀塘道和勵業街交界交通燈失靈，駕駛人士在駛經有關路口時，請加倍小心，注意交通標誌的指示並留意過路行人的安全。行人在交通燈失靈的路口橫過馬路時，請特別注意車輛。 現時上址交通繁忙。

message.CONTENT_EN: Due to traffic accident , part of the lanes of West Kowloon Highway (Kwai Chung bound) near Hoi Fai Road Roundabout is closed to all traffic. Only remaining lanes are available to motorists. Traffic is busy now.
message.CONTENT_CN: 因交通意外，西九龍公路(往葵涌方向)近海輝道迴旋處的部份行車線現已封閉。 駕駛人士只可使用餘下行車線行車。 現時上址交通繁忙。

message.CONTENT_EN: All traffic lights at the junction of Kwun Tong Road and Lai Yip Street have resumed normal. Motorists are advised to pay attention to radio / TV announcements on traffic conditions.
message.CONTENT_CN: 位於觀塘道及勵業街交界的交通燈已恢復正常運作。 駕駛人士請留意電台/電視廣播的最新交通情況。

message.CONTENT_EN: Due to traffic accident , part of the lanes of Shing Mun Tunnel Road (Tai Po bound) near Hong Kong Heritage Museum is closed to all traffic. Only remaining lanes are available to motorists. Traffic is busy now.
message.CONTENT_CN: 因交通意外，城門隧道公路(往大埔方向)近香港文化博物館的部份行車線現已封閉。 駕駛人士只可使用餘下行車線行車。 現時上址交通繁忙。

message.CONTENT_CN: 較早前因交通意外而封閉的屯門公路(往九龍方向)近兆康港鐵站的慢線現已解封。

message.CONTENT_EN: Due to traffic accident , part of the lanes of Shing Mun Tunnel Road (Tai Po bound) near Hong Kong Heritage Museum is still being closed to all traffic. Only remaining lanes are available to motorists. Traffic queue on Shing Mun Tunnel Road (Tai Po bound) ends at Tsing Sha Highway (Sha Tin Heights Tunnel). Traffic is congested now.
message.CONTENT_CN: 因交通意外，城門隧道公路(往大埔方向)近香港文化博物館的部份行車線仍然封閉。 駕駛人士只可使用餘下行車線行車。 現時在城門隧道公路(往大埔方向)的車龍龍尾已到青沙公路(沙田嶺隧道)。 現時上址交通擠塞。

message.CONTENT_EN: The only lane of the slip road leading from Tolo Highway (Fanling bound) to Tat Wan Road (Tai Po (South) bound) which was closed due to traffic accident is re-opened to all traffic.
message.CONTENT_CN: 較早前因交通意外而封閉的由吐露港公路(往粉嶺方向)通往達運道(往大埔(南)方向) 的支路 的 唯一行車線現已解封。

message.CONTENT_CN: 較早前因交通意外而封閉的將軍澳道(往將軍澳隧道方向)近翠屏南邨的部份行車線現已解封。

message.CONTENT_CN: 較早前因交通意外而封閉的城門隧道公路(往大埔方向)近香港文化博物館的部份行車線現已解封。 車龍有待消散。

message.INCIDENT_DETAIL_EN: Temporary Service Adjustment of Park Island Ferry Services
message.INCIDENT_DETAIL_CN: 珀麗灣客運渡輪服務臨時調整
message.CONTENT_EN:
The following ferry services are temporarily adjusted on 15 April 2026: Park Island Transport Company Limited 'Ma Wan - Central’ Route: - Ma Wan to Central: Sailings departing at 5:00 p. m. and 7:30 p. m. are replaced by bus services (Route NR338S) - Central to Ma Wan: Sailings departing at 5:30 p. m. and 8:00 p. m. are replaced by bus services (Route NR338S)
'Ma Wan - Tsuen Wan’ Route: - Ma Wan to Tsuen Wan: Sailing at 8:10 a. m. is cancelled - Tsuen Wan to Ma Wan: Sailing at 8:30 a. m. is cancelled .
message.CONTENT_CN:
以下渡輪服務於2026年4⽉15⽇作出臨時調整： 珀麗灣客運有限公司 「⾺灣-中環」航線： -⾺灣⾄中環：下午5時及下午7時30分開出的班次由巴⼠服務(路線NR338S)代替營運 -中環⾄⾺灣：下午5時30分及下午8時開出的班次由巴⼠服務(路線NR338S)代替營運
「⾺灣-荃灣」航線： -⾺灣⾄荃灣：取消上午8時10分開出的班次 -荃灣⾄⾺灣：取消上午8時30分開出的班次 。

message.INCIDENT_DETAIL_EN: Special traffic and transport arrangements for the dispersal of the Hong Kong Sevens 2026 at the Kai Tak Stadium
message.INCIDENT_DETAIL_CN: 啟德主場館二○二六香港國際七人欖球賽離場特別交通及運輸安排
message.LOCATION_EN: Special traffic and transport arrangements for the dispersal of the Hong Kong Sevens 2026 at the Kai Tak Stadium
message.LOCATION_CN: 啟德主場館二○二六香港國際七人欖球賽離場特別交通及運輸安排
message.CONTENT_EN:
The Hong Kong Sevens 2026 will be held on this Friday, Saturday and Sunday (April 17, 18 and 19) at the Kai Tak Sports Park. As a large number of spectators is expected to disperse at the same time after the end of the last match on each event day, the Transport Department (TD) urges those leaving the venue to take the MTR as far as possible.
Details of Public Transport Services
MTR: - The headway of the Tuen Ma Line will be enhanced to disperse spectators;
Special bus routes: - Ten special bus routes have been arranged at the Sung Wong Toi Road Pick-up/Drop-off Area departing for ports and major districts across the territory, including route nos. SP2A and SP10 which will pass via Nathan Road near Knutsford Terrace in Tsim Sha Tsui, and via Causeway Bay near Paterson Street, Wan Chai and Central (Lan Kwai Fong and SoHo) respectively; and
Taxis: - Taxi pick-up/drop-off area at the Kai Tak Stadium (G/F outside Gate H) is opened for taxi pick-up. In view of an outflux of spectators, the waiting time is anticipated to be longer and your patience is appreciated.
Spectators are advised to take heed of the real-time information via on-site broadcast and the "Easy Leave" (easyleave. police. gov. hk) as well as the latest traffic news through the TD's website (www. td. gov. hk), the "HKeMobility" mobile application, radio and television broadcasts.
message.CONTENT_CN:
啟德體育園將於本週週五、週六及週日(四月十七日、十八日及十九日)舉行二○二六香港國際七人欖球賽。由於在每日最後一場賽事完結後，預計會有較多觀眾在同一時間離場，運輸署呼籲離場人士盡量乘搭港鐵。
公共運輸服務詳情
港鐵： -屯馬綫將加密班次疏導離場觀眾；
特別巴士路線： -宋皇臺道上落客區已安排10條特別巴士路線前往港九新界各主要地區，當中包括第SP2A號線和第SP10號線，分別行經彌敦道近尖沙咀諾士佛臺，以及銅鑼灣近百德新街、灣仔及中環（蘭桂坊和蘇豪區）；及
的士： -啟德主場館的士上落客區（H閘外地面）開放供的士上客。由於離場人士較多，預期輪候時間會較長，請耐心輪候登車。
觀眾請留意場地廣播和「離場易」（easyleave.police.gov.hk）提供的實時資訊，以及經運輸署網頁（www.td.gov.hk）、「香港出行易」流動應用程式、電台和電視台發放的最新交通消息。

message.CONTENT_EN: Due to malfunction of traffic lights at the junction of Prince Edward Road West and Nathan Road, motorists are advised to drive with utmost care when passing through the road junctions, pay extra attention to the traffic signs and safety of pedestrians. Pedestrians please pay attention to vehicles when crossing junctions with malfunctioned traffic lights. Traffic is busy now.
message.CONTENT_CN: 由於太子道西和彌敦道交界的交通燈失靈，駕駛人士在駛經有關路口時，請加倍小心，注意交通標誌的指示並留意過路行人的安全。 行人在交通燈失靈的路口橫過馬路時，請特別注意車輛。 現時上址交通繁忙。

message.INCIDENT_DETAIL_EN: MTR service arrangements for the Hong Kong Sevens 2026 at the Kai Tak Stadium
message.INCIDENT_DETAIL_CN: 啟德主場館2026香港國際七人欖球賽港鐵服務安排
message.CONTENT_EN: Transport Department has received notification from MTR Corporation Limited that the Hong Kong Sevens will take place at Kai Tak Sports Park from 17 to 19 April. Passengers travelling to the event can use either Kai Tak or Sung Wong Toi stations. After the games, enhanced MTR train services will be arranged. If passengers need to cross the boundary, please note the last train schedule to Lo Wu: For more details, please visit: https://www.td.gov.hk/en/special_news/spnews.htm.
message.CONTENT_CN:
運輸署接獲港鐵公司通知，啟德體育園於4月17 -19日舉行香港國際七人欖球賽。前往觀賞的乘客可使用啟德或宋皇臺站。散場時，港鐵會加密列車班次。需要過境的乘客，請留意往羅湖尾班車時間： 詳情請參看: https://www.td.gov.hk/tc/special_news/spnews.htm
。

message.INCIDENT_DETAIL_EN: Temporary Service Adjustment of Park Island Ferry Services
message.INCIDENT_DETAIL_CN: 珀麗灣客運渡輪服務臨時調整
message.CONTENT_EN:
The following ferry services are temporarily adjusted on 17 April 2026: Park Island Transport Company Limited ‘Ma Wan - Central’ Route: - Ma Wan to Central: Sailings departing at 5:00 p. m. and 7:30 p. m. are replaced by bus services (Route NR338S) - Central to Ma Wan: Sailings departing at 5:30 p. m. and 8:00 p. m. are replaced by bus services (Route NR338S)
‘Ma Wan - Tsuen Wan’ Route: - Ma Wan to Tsuen Wan: Sailing at 8:10 a. m. is cancelled - Tsuen Wan to Ma Wan: Sailing at 8:30 a. m. is cancelled .
message.CONTENT_CN:
以下渡輪服務於2026年4⽉17⽇作出臨時調整： 珀麗灣客運有限公司 「⾺灣-中環」航線： -⾺灣⾄中環：下午5時及下午7時30分開出的班次由巴⼠服務(路線NR338S)代替營運 -中環⾄⾺灣：下午5時30分及下午8時開出的班次由巴⼠服務(路線NR338S)代替營運
「⾺灣-荃灣」航線： -⾺灣⾄荃灣：取消上午8時10分開出的班次 -荃灣⾄⾺灣：取消上午8時30分開出的班次 。

message.INCIDENT_DETAIL_EN: High Speed Rail (Hong Kong Section) runs additional (sleeper) train trips
message.INCIDENT_DETAIL_CN: 高速鐵路(香港段)加開臨時臥鋪列車服務
message.CONTENT_EN:
As informed by the Chinese Mainland Railway Authorities, High Speed Rail (Hong Kong Section) will add the following temporary sleeper train trips:
30 Apr, and 5, 6, 7 May: - G898 (From Hong Kong West Kowloon Station to Beijingxi Station) - G897 (From Beijingxi Station to Hong Kong West Kowloon Station)
Tickets are available for purchase through the 12306 official website (12306. cn) or mobile app; appointed travel agents; or at Hong Kong West Kowloon Station.
For train schedules, please refer to the 12306 official website (12306. cn) or mobile app, or the High Speed Rail website or mobile app.
message.CONTENT_CN:
中國內地鐵路部門通知，高速鐵路（香港段）將加開以下臨時臥鋪列車車次：
4月30日，5月5日，6日，7日： -G898 (由香港西九龍站前往北京西站) -G897 (由北京西站前往香港西九龍站)
市民可透過12306官方網站(12306.cn)或手機應用程式、指定代理或前往香港西九龍站購買列車車票。
有關列車服務詳情，請瀏覽12306官方網站(12306.cn)或手機應用程式、高速鐵路網頁及手機應用程式。

message.CONTENT_EN: Amber Rainstorm Warning Signal is in force. Due to wet weather and slippery roads, Transport Department appeals motorists and the commuters to: i. plan the journey in advance; ii. allow more traveling time; iii. drive with extra care and patience; and iv. take heed of traffic situation particularly at busy junctions with obstructive views.
message.CONTENT_CN: 黃色暴雨警告信號現已生效，天雨路滑，運輸署呼籲駕駛人士及乘客須: i.提早計劃行程路線； ii.預留充裕時間出門； iii.小心駕駛及保持忍讓；及 iv.留意交通情況，特别在視線受阻的繁忙路口。

message.CONTENT_EN:
The following road sections are busy:
Hong Kong Island – Connaught Road Central (Western Harbour Crossing bound) – Connaught Road Central flyover (Western Harbour Crossing bound) – Harcourt Road (Central bound)
Motorists passing through the above road sections are advised to drive with utmost care and patience.

message.INCIDENT_DETAIL_EN: Temporary Service Adjustment of Park Island Ferry Services
message.INCIDENT_DETAIL_CN: 珀麗灣客運渡輪服務臨時調整
message.CONTENT_EN: The following ferry services are temporarily adjusted on 20 April 2026: Park Island Transport Company Limited ‘Ma Wan - Central’ Route: - Ma Wan to Central: Sailings departing at 5:00 p. m. and 7:30 p. m. are replaced by bus services (Route NR338S) - Central to Ma Wan: Sailings departing at 5:30 p. m. and 8:00 p. m. are replaced by bus services (Route NR338S) ‘Ma Wan - Tsuen Wan’ Route: - Ma Wan to Tsuen Wan: Sailing at 8:10 a. m. is cancelled - Tsuen Wan to Ma Wan: Sailing at 8:30 a. m. is cancelled
message.CONTENT_CN: 以下渡輪服務於2026年4⽉20⽇作出臨時調整：珀麗灣客運有限公司「⾺灣-中環」航線：-⾺灣⾄中環：下午5時及下午7時30分開出的班次由巴⼠服務(路線NR338S)代替營運-中環⾄⾺灣：下午5時30分及下午8時開出的班次由巴⼠服務(路線NR338S)代替營運「⾺灣-荃灣」航線：-⾺灣⾄荃灣：取消上午8時10分開出的班次-荃灣⾄⾺灣：取消上午8時30分開出的班次

message.INCIDENT_DETAIL_EN: Temporary Service Adjustment of Park Island Ferry Services
message.INCIDENT_DETAIL_CN: 珀麗灣客運渡輪服務臨時調整
message.CONTENT_EN:
The following ferry services are temporarily adjusted on 21 April 2026: Park Island Transport Company Limited 'Ma Wan - Central' Route: - Ma Wan to Central: Sailings departing at 5:00 p. m. and 7:30 p. m. are replaced by bus services (Route NR338S) - Central to Ma Wan: Sailings departing at 5:30 p. m. and 8:00 p. m. are replaced by bus services (Route NR338S)
'Ma Wan - Tsuen Wan' Route: - Ma Wan to Tsuen Wan: Sailing at 8:10 a. m. is cancelled - Tsuen Wan to Ma Wan: Sailing at 8:30 a. m. is cancelled.
message.CONTENT_CN:
以下渡輪服務於2026年4⽉21⽇作出臨時調整： 珀麗灣客運有限公司 「⾺灣-中環」航線： - ⾺灣⾄中環：下午5時及下午7時30分開出的班次由巴⼠服務(路線NR338S)代替營運 - 中環⾄⾺灣：下午5時30分及下午8時開出的班次由巴⼠服務(路線NR338S)代替營運
「⾺灣-荃灣」航線： - ⾺灣⾄荃灣：取消上午8時10分開出的班次 - 荃灣⾄⾺灣：取消上午8時30分開出的班次。

message.INCIDENT_DETAIL_EN: Temporary Service Adjustment of Park Island Ferry Services
message.INCIDENT_DETAIL_CN: 珀麗灣客運渡輪服務臨時調整
message.CONTENT_EN:
The following ferry services are temporarily adjusted on 22 April 2026: Park Island Transport Company Limited 'Ma Wan - Central' Route: - Ma Wan to Central: Sailings departing at 5:00 p. m. and 7:30 p. m. are replaced by bus services (Route NR338S) - Central to Ma Wan: Sailings departing at 5:30 p. m. and 8:00 p. m. are replaced by bus services (Route NR338S)
'Ma Wan - Tsuen Wan' Route: - Ma Wan to Tsuen Wan: Sailing at 8:10 a. m. is cancelled - Tsuen Wan to Ma Wan: Sailing at 8:30 a. m. is cancelled.
message.CONTENT_CN:
以下渡輪服務於2026年4⽉22⽇作出臨時調整： 珀麗灣客運有限公司 「⾺灣-中環」航線： - ⾺灣⾄中環：下午5時及下午7時30分開出的班次由巴⼠服務(路線NR338S)代替營運 - 中環⾄⾺灣：下午5時30分及下午8時開出的班次由巴⼠服務(路線NR338S)代替營運
「⾺灣-荃灣」航線： - ⾺灣⾄荃灣：取消上午8時10分開出的班次 - 荃灣⾄⾺灣：取消上午8時30分開出的班次。

message.INCIDENT_DETAIL_EN: High Speed Rail (Hong Kong Section) adds temporary train trips
message.INCIDENT_DETAIL_CN: 高速鐵路(香港段)加開臨時列車服務
message.CONTENT_EN: In response to the demand, the High Speed Rail (Hong Kong Section) will add the following temporary train trips from 30 Apr to 3 May: From Hong Kong West Kowloon Station to Futian Station: G5834, G5836, G5838, G5840, G5842, G5844, G5846, G5848, G5850, G5852, G5854, G5856, G5868 From Futian Station to Hong Kong West Kowloon Station: G5833, G5835, G5837, G5839, G5841, G5843, G5845, G5847, G5849, G5851, G5853, G5855, G5867 Tickets are available for purchase through the 12306 official website or mobile app; appointed travel agents; or at Hong Kong West Kowloon Station. For train schedules, please refer to the 12306 official website or mobile app, or the High Speed Rail website or mobile app.
message.CONTENT_CN: 配合客運需求，高速鐵路(香港段)於4月30日至5月3日將加開以下臨時列車車次： 由香港西九龍站前往福田站：G5834,G5836,G5838,G5840,G5842,G5844,G5846,G5848,G5850,G5852,G5854,G5856,G5868 由福田站前往香港西九龍站：G5833,G5835,G5837,G5839,G5841,G5843,G5845,G5847,G5849,G5851,G5853,G5855,G5867 你可透過12306官方網站(12306.cn)或手機應用程式、指定代理或前往香港西九龍站購買列車車票。 有關列車服務詳情，請瀏覽12306官方網站(12306.cn)或手機應用程式、高速鐵路網頁及手機應用程式。

message.INCIDENT_DETAIL_EN: Temporary Service Adjustment of Park Island Ferry Services
message.INCIDENT_DETAIL_CN: 珀麗灣客運渡輪服務臨時調整
message.CONTENT_EN:
The following ferry services are temporarily adjusted on 23 April 2026: Park Island Transport Company Limited 'Ma Wan - Central' Route: - Ma Wan to Central: Sailings departing at 5:00 p. m. and 7:30 p. m. are replaced by bus services (Route NR338S) - Central to Ma Wan: Sailings departing at 5:30 p. m. and 8:00 p. m. are replaced by bus services (Route NR338S)
'Ma Wan - Tsuen Wan' Route: - Ma Wan to Tsuen Wan: Sailing at 8:10 a. m. is cancelled - Tsuen Wan to Ma Wan: Sailing at 8:30 a. m. is cancelled.
message.CONTENT_CN:
以下渡輪服務於2026年4⽉23⽇作出臨時調整： 珀麗灣客運有限公司 「⾺灣-中環」航線： - ⾺灣⾄中環：下午5時及下午7時30分開出的班次由巴⼠服務(路線NR338S)代替營運 - 中環⾄⾺灣：下午5時30分及下午8時開出的班次由巴⼠服務(路線NR338S)代替營運
「⾺灣-荃灣」航線： - ⾺灣⾄荃灣：取消上午8時10分開出的班次 - 荃灣⾄⾺灣：取消上午8時30分開出的班次。

message.CONTENT_CN: 大埔公路 – 沙田段(往大埔方向)近沙田馬場的交通現已恢復正常。

message.CONTENT_EN: Members of the public are advised that, the traffic within Wo Hop Shek Cemetery and in its vicinity (including Tai Wo Service Road West, Wah Ming Road, Wo Hing Road, Kiu Tau Road, Pak Wo Road, etc. ) is still busy. Motorists should exercise tolerance and patience, and follow the instructions of the Police. Citizens please take note bus services travelling via the vicinity of Pak Wo Road, Tai Wo Service Road West and Fanling Highway have been affected. KMB routes nos. 277X and 278X have been diverted. For the latest service arrangement of individual bus route, members of the public can refer to the information on the bus company's website or mobile application. Members of the public heading to the vicinity of Wo Hop Shek, please plan ahead and reserve sufficient travelling time.
message.CONTENT_CN: 公眾人士請留意，和合石墳場內及附近一帶道路（包括大窩西支路、華明路、和興路、橋頭路、百和路等）的交通仍然繁忙。駕駛人士請保持忍讓，並遵從警方的指示。 市民請留意途經百和路、大窩西支路及粉嶺公路一帶的巴士服務會受到影響。 九巴第277X及278X號線須改道行駛。有關個別巴士路線的最新服務情況，市民可參閱巴士公司的網頁或流動應用程式內的資訊。 前往和合石一帶的市民請提早計劃行程，預留充裕交通時間。

message.CONTENT_EN: Due to traffic accident , part of the lanes of Gascoigne Road Flyover (Hung Hom bound) near Prosperous Garden is closed to all traffic. Only remaining lanes are available to motorists. Traffic is busy now.
message.CONTENT_CN: 因交通意外，加士居道天橋(往紅磡方向)近駿發花園的部份行車線現已封閉。 駕駛人士只可使用餘下行車線行車。 現時上址交通繁忙。

message.CONTENT_EN: Part of the lanes of Gascoigne Road Flyover (Hung Hom bound) near Prosperous Garden which was closed due to traffic accident is re-opened to all traffic.

message.CONTENT_EN: The traffic within Wo Hop Shek Cemetery and in its vicinity is gradually resuming normal. Diverted KMB routes nos. 277X and 278X, due to earlier heavy traffic, have resumed to their original routeings.
message.CONTENT_CN: 和合石墳場內及附近一帶道路的交通正在陸續回復正常。 市民請留意途經大窩西支路的巴士路線仍然受到影響。因較早前交通繁忙而改道的九巴第277X及278X號線已恢復原有路線行駛。

message.CONTENT_EN: The traffic within Wo Hop Shek Cemetery and in its vicinity has resumed normal. Bus services travelling via Tai Wo Service Road West have gradually resumed normal.

message.INCIDENT_DETAIL_EN: Temporary Service Adjustment of Park Island Ferry Services
message.INCIDENT_DETAIL_CN: 珀麗灣客運渡輪服務臨時調整
message.CONTENT_EN:
The following ferry services are temporarily adjusted on 27 April 2026: Park Island Transport Company Limited 'Ma Wan - Central' Route: - Ma Wan to Central: Sailings departing at 5:00 p. m. and 7:30 p. m. are replaced by bus services (Route NR338S) - Central to Ma Wan: Sailings departing at 5:30 p. m. and 8:00 p. m. are replaced by bus services (Route NR338S)
'Ma Wan - Tsuen Wan' Route: - Ma Wan to Tsuen Wan: Sailing at 8:10 a. m. is cancelled - Tsuen Wan to Ma Wan: Sailing at 8:30 a. m. is cancelled .
message.CONTENT_CN:
以下渡輪服務於2026年4⽉27⽇作出臨時調整： 珀麗灣客運有限公司 「⾺灣 - 中環」航線： - ⾺灣⾄中環：下午5時及下午7時30分開出的班次由巴⼠服務(路線NR338S)代替營運 - 中環⾄⾺灣：下午5時30分及下午8時開出的班次由巴⼠服務(路線NR338S)代替營運
「⾺灣 - 荃灣」航線： - ⾺灣⾄荃灣：取消上午8時10分開出的班次 - 荃灣⾄⾺灣：取消上午8時30分開出的班次 。

message.INCIDENT_DETAIL_EN: High Speed Rail (Hong Kong Section) adds temporary train trips
message.INCIDENT_DETAIL_CN: 高速鐵路(香港段)加開臨時列車服務
message.CONTENT_EN: In response to the demand, the High Speed Rail (Hong Kong Section) will add the following temporary train trips: 30 Apr to 3 May From Hong Kong West Kowloon Station to Futian Station: G5834, G5836, G5838, G5840, G5842, G5844, G5846, G5848, G5850, G5852, G5854, G5856, G5868 From Futian Station to Hong Kong West Kowloon Station: G5833, G5835, G5837, G5839, G5841, G5843, G5845, G5847, G5849, G5851, G5853, G5855, G5867 4-5 May: From Hong Kong West Kowloon Station to Shenzhenbei Station: G5680 From Hong Kong West Kowloon Station to Futian Station: G5866 From Shenzhenbei Station to Hong Kong West Kowloon Station: G5679 From Futian Station to Hong Kong West Kowloon Station: G5865 Tickets are available for purchase through the 12306 official website or mobile app; appointed travel agents; or at Hong Kong West Kowloon Station. For train schedules, please refer to the 12306 official website or mobile app, or the High Speed Rail website or mobile app.
message.CONTENT_CN: 配合客運需求，高速鐵路(香港段)將加開以下臨時列車車次： 4月30日至5月3日 由香港西九龍站前往福田站：G5834,G5836,G5838,G5840,G5842,G5844,G5846,G5848,G5850,G5852,G5854,G5856,G5868 由福田站前往香港西九龍站：G5833,G5835,G5837,G5839,G5841,G5843,G5845,G5847,G5849,G5851,G5853,G5855,G5867 5月4日至5月5日 由香港西九龍站前往深圳北站：G5680 由香港西九龍站前往福田站：G5866 由深圳北站前往香港西九龍站：G5679 由福田站前往香港西九龍站：G5865 你可透過12306官方網站或手機應用程式、指定代理或前往香港西九龍站購買列車車票。 有關列車服務詳情，請瀏覽12306官方網站或手機應用程式、高速鐵路網頁及手機應用程式。

message.CONTENT_EN: As it is the peak period for travel, please: 1. allow more time for immigration procedures. You may enter the gate at Level B1 up to 120 minutes before the departure of your train. 2. visit the 12306 official website (12306. cn) or mobile app to check for the latest train schedules and any service adjustments. 3. use public transport to get to the station as parking places will be in high demand. 4. use the drop-off/pick-up area at the Ground level, Exit B (Wui Man Road pick-up/drop-off area) for pre-booked taxis or vehicles.
message.CONTENT_CN: 因應假日出行高峰，出發前請注意： 1.預留足夠時間辦理出入境手續。最早可於開車前120分鐘於B1層入閘。 2.瀏覽12306官方網站(12306.cn)或手機應用程式，查看最新列車班次及車務調動資訊。 3.車站停車場泊位需求緊張，建議使用公共交通工具前往。 4.建議於地面層B出口(匯民道上落客區)等候預約的士或車輛。

message.INCIDENT_DETAIL_EN: Traffic within Wo Hop Shek Cemetery and in its vicinity during weekend
message.INCIDENT_DETAIL_CN: 週末和合石墳場內及附近一帶的交通
message.CONTENT_EN: Members of the public are advised that, the traffic within Wo Hop Shek Cemetery and in its vicinity (including Tai Wo Service Road West, Wah Ming Road, Wo Hing Road and Pak Wo Road, etc. ) is expected to be busier on this weekend. The Police will implement temporary traffic control measures depending on actual situation. Motorists are advised to watch out for the latest traffic news through media. In case of traffic congestion, motorists should exercise tolerance and patience, and follow the instructions of the Police.

message.INCIDENT_DETAIL_EN: Temporary Service Adjustment of Park Island Ferry Services
message.INCIDENT_DETAIL_CN: 珀麗灣客運渡輪服務臨時調整
message.CONTENT_EN: The following ferry services are temporarily adjusted on 28 April 2026: Park Island Transport Company Limited 'Ma Wan - Central' Route: - Ma Wan to Central: Sailings departing at 5:00 p. m. and 7:30 p. m. are replaced by bus services (Route NR338S) - Central to Ma Wan: Sailings departing at 5:30 p. m. and 8:00 p. m. are replaced by bus services (Route NR338S) 'Ma Wan - Tsuen Wan' Route: - Ma Wan to Tsuen Wan: Sailing at 8:10 a. m. is cancelled - Tsuen Wan to Ma Wan: Sailing at 8:30 a. m. is cancelled
message.CONTENT_CN: 以下渡輪服務於2026年4⽉28⽇作出臨時調整： 珀麗灣客運有限公司 「⾺灣-中環」航線： -⾺灣⾄中環：下午5時及下午7時30分開出的班次由巴⼠服務(路線NR338S)代替營運 -中環⾄⾺灣：下午5時30分及下午8時開出的班次由巴⼠服務(路線NR338S)代替營運 「⾺灣-荃灣」航線： -⾺灣⾄荃灣：取消上午8時10分開出的班次 -荃灣⾄⾺灣：取消上午8時30分開出的班次

message.INCIDENT_DETAIL_EN: Enhanced cross-boundary train service during Labour Day and Golden Week
message.INCIDENT_DETAIL_CN: 五一黃金周加強跨境列車服務
message.CONTENT_EN: Transport Department has received notification from MTR Corporation Limited that To meet passengers’ travel needs, East Rail Line train frequency will be increased during selected periods for the Labour Day and “Golden Week” holiday (30 April – 5 May). Please refer to MTR's website for more information.
message.CONTENT_CN: 運輸署接獲港鐵公司通知， 為方便大家出遊，東鐵綫會於勞動節及「五一黃金周」期間(4月30日至5月5日)部分時段加密列車班次。 詳情請參閱港鐵網頁。

message.INCIDENT_DETAIL_EN: Temporary Service Adjustment of Park Island Ferry Services
message.INCIDENT_DETAIL_CN: 珀麗灣客運渡輪服務臨時調整
message.CONTENT_EN: The following ferry services are temporarily adjusted on 29 April 2026: Park Island Transport Company Limited 'Ma Wan - Central' Route: - Ma Wan to Central: Sailings departing at 5:00 p. m. and 7:30 p. m. are replaced by bus services (Route NR338S) - Central to Ma Wan: Sailings departing at 5:30 p. m. and 8:00 p. m. are replaced by bus services (Route NR338S) 'Ma Wan - Tsuen Wan' Route: - Ma Wan to Tsuen Wan: Sailing at 8:10 a. m. is cancelled - Tsuen Wan to Ma Wan: Sailing at 8:30 a. m. is cancelled
message.CONTENT_CN: 以下渡輪服務於2026年4⽉29⽇作出臨時調整： 珀麗灣客運有限公司 「⾺灣-中環」航線： -⾺灣⾄中環：下午5時及下午7時30分開出的班次由巴⼠服務(路線NR338S)代替營運 -中環⾄⾺灣：下午5時30分及下午8時開出的班次由巴⼠服務(路線NR338S)代替營運 「⾺灣-荃灣」航線： -⾺灣⾄荃灣：取消上午8時10分開出的班次 -荃灣⾄⾺灣：取消上午8時30分開出的班次

message.CONTENT_EN: Amber Rainstorm Warning Signal is in force. Due to wet weather and slippery roads, Transport Department appeals motorists and the commuters to: i. plan the journey in advance; ii. allow more traveling time; iii. drive with extra care and patience; and iv. take heed of traffic situation particularly at busy junctions with obstructive views.
message.CONTENT_CN: 黃色暴雨警告信號現已生效，天雨路滑，運輸署呼籲駕駛人士及乘客須: i.提早計劃行程路線； ii.預留充裕時間出門； iii.小心駕駛及保持忍讓；及 iv.留意交通情況，特别在視線受阻的繁忙路口。

message.CONTENT_CN: 由於強風，港珠澳大橋香港連接路已實施以下特別交通及運輸安排： 港珠澳大橋香港連接路的最高車速限制由每小時100 公里降低至每小時50 公里。

message.INCIDENT_DETAIL_EN: Cross-boundary Transport Services and Special Traffic Arrangements during Mainland’s Labour Day Golden Week
message.INCIDENT_DETAIL_CN: 內地勞動節黃金周期間的跨境運輸服務及特別交通安排
message.CONTENT_EN: The Transport Department (TD) anticipates that there may be a large number of cross-boundary passengers and vehicles travelling between Hong Kong and the Mainland or Macao via various land-based boundary control points (BCPs) during Mainland’s Labour Day Golden Week (May 1 to 5). The TD urges cross-boundary travellers to plan ahead of their trips and allow sufficient travelling time. The TD has been steering local and cross-boundary public transport (PT) services operators to enhance their capacity and reserve sufficient vehicles and manpower to meet the transport needs of cross-boundary passengers during Mainland’s Labour Day Golden Week. It is anticipated that the waiting time for PT services, including the Hong Kong-Zhuhai-Macao Bridge (HZMB) shuttle bus (Gold Bus) and local franchised bus “B” routes connecting various land-based BCPs, may be longer during peak periods of cross-boundary travel. Passengers should avoid travelling during peak hours, observe order while queuing and heed advice from on-site Police and staff of the PT operators. Passengers intending to take cross-boundary coaches are also advised to reserve their coach tickets in advance. Motorists of cross-boundary private cars crossing the border are advised that, subject to actual traffic conditions, special traffic arrangements may be implemented at Lok Ma Chau Control Point and Shenzhen Bay Port during Mainland’s Labour Day Golden Week to secure smooth access for PT vehicles to the above BCPs. Cross-boundary private cars may experience longer waiting times when crossing the BCPs during the peak periods. Motorists should pay extra attention to variable message signs and traffic signs along the approach roads to the BCPs. In case of traffic congestion, they should remain patient and follow the instructions of on-site Police. For the HZMB, to plan their journeys ahead, members of the public can make use of this mobile app or website of HKeMobility (hkemobility. gov. hk/en/traffic-information/live/cctv) to access snapshots of traffic conditions at inbound and outbound vehicle plazas of the HZMB Hong Kong Port. They can also check the real-time situations of the vehicle clearance plaza of the Zhuhai Port through the WeChat official accounts “hzmbzhport” or “zhuhaifabu” (traffic-info. gzazhka. com:5015/#/) (Chinese only). Moreover, motorists are reminded to always comply with the traffic control measures implemented by the Zhuhai authority when driving on the HZMB Main Bridge. Vehicles must not occupy the emergency lane unless instructed by the Zhuhai authority. Residents and visitors may visit “Easy Boundary” (www. sb. gov. hk/eng/bwt/status. html?type=outbound), a one-stop information platform on immigration clearance launched by the Security Bureau, this mobile app or the website of HKeMobility to obtain useful information, including the respective average waiting time for passengers and private cars at land-based BCPs, as well as for the Gold Bus, the Lok Ma Chau-Huanggang cross-boundary shuttle bus (Yellow Bus) and MTR to plan their trips and save waiting time. Members of the public are advised to check the latest traffic news through radio, the television broadcasts, the TD’s website (www. td. gov. hk) and the HKeMobility.
message.CONTENT_CN: 運輸署預計在內地勞動節黃金周期間（五月一日至五日）可能出現大量跨境人士及車輛經各陸路口岸往來香港和內地或澳門。運輸署呼籲跨境出行人士及早規劃行程，預留充裕交通時間。 運輸署已督導本地及跨境公共運輸服務營辦商（營辦商），在內地勞動節黃金周期間加大運力，預留足夠車輛及人手以應對跨境人士的出行需求。運輸署預計公共運輸服務（包括港珠澳大橋穿梭巴士（金巴）及連接各陸路管制站的本地專營巴士「B」線）在跨境人流高峰時段的等候時間或會較長，乘客應避免於繁忙時段出行。候車期間遵守秩序，並遵從現場警務人員及營辦商職員的指示。計劃乘坐跨境巴士的人士亦應提早預訂車票。 駕駛跨境私家車出入境人士請注意，視乎現場交通情況，落馬洲管制站及深圳灣口岸在內地勞動節黃金周期間或會實施特別交通安排，以便保障公共運輸車輛能暢順前往上述口岸，跨境私家車或需輪候通過口岸。駕駛人士請特別留意前往口岸道路沿途的可變信息顯示屏及交通標誌。如遇交通受阻，請保持忍讓及遵從現場警務人員的指示。 至於港珠澳大橋，市民可透過本應用程式或「香港出行易」網頁（hkemobility.gov.hk/tc/traffic-information/live/cctv），查閱大橋香港口岸出境及入境客車通關廣場的交通快拍，亦可透過「港珠澳大橋珠海口岸」或「珠海發布」微信公眾號內的「大橋口岸實時通關」服務（traffic-info.gzazhka.com:5015/#/），查閱大橋珠海口岸的車輛實時通關情況，以便及早計劃行程。此外，運輸署提醒駕駛人士於大橋主橋行駛時，應時刻遵照珠海當局實施的交通管控措施，除非獲珠海市當局指示，否則車輛一律不可佔用應急車道。 市民和旅客可透過保安局的一站式過關資訊平台「口岸通」（www.sb.gov.hk/chi/bwt/status.html?type=outbound）、本應用程式或「香港出行易」網頁，取得各陸路口岸旅客和私家車過關平均輪候時間，以及金巴、落馬洲—皇崗過境穿梭巴士（皇巴）及港鐵服務的平均輪候時間等有用資訊，以便計劃行程及減省等候時間。市民請留意電台、電視台、運輸署網頁（www.td.gov.hk）及「香港出行易」發放的最新交通消息。

message.INCIDENT_DETAIL_EN: Special traffic and transport arrangements for departure of concert at the Kai Tak Stadium
message.INCIDENT_DETAIL_CN: 啟德主場館演唱會離場特別交通及運輸安排
message.CONTENT_EN: Concerts will be held on this Sunday and next Monday (May 3 and 4) at the Kai Tak Stadium. As a large number of spectators is expected to disperse at the same time, the Transport Department (TD) urges those leaving the venue to take the MTR as far as possible. Details of Public Transport Services MTR: - The headway of the Tuen Ma Line will be enhanced to disperse spectators; - Of note, for cross-boundary travellers, the last train to Lo Wu Station on the East Rail Line via interchanging at Tai Wai Station will depart from Sung Wong Toi Station at 10.59pm and Kai Tak Station at 11.01pm; Special bus routes: - Eleven special bus routes have been arranged at the Sung Wong Toi Road Pick-up/Drop-off Area departing for ports and major districts across the territory; - Cross-boundary travellers may take route no. SP12 to Lok Ma Chau (San Tin) Public Transport Interchange and transfer to the Lok Ma Chau-Huanggang cross-boundary shuttle bus (Yellow Bus) to Lok Ma Chau/Huanggang (LMC/HG) Port; or route no. A25S to the Hong Kong-Zhuhai-Macao Bridge (HZMB) Hong Kong Port and transfer to the HZMB shuttle bus (Gold Bus) to Macao and Zhuhai; and Taxis: - Taxi pick-up/drop-off area at the Kai Tak Stadium (G/F outside Gate H) is opened for taxi pick-up. In view of an outflux of spectators, the waiting time is anticipated to be longer and your patience is appreciated. Spectators are advised to take heed of the real-time information via on-site broadcast and the "Easy Leave" (easyleave. police. gov. hk) as well as the latest traffic news through the TD's website (www. td. gov. hk), the "HKeMobility" mobile application, radio and television broadcasts.
message.CONTENT_CN: 啟德主場館將於本週日及下週一(五月三日及四日)晚上舉行演唱會。由於同一時間離場觀眾較多，運輸署呼籲離場人士盡量乘搭港鐵。 公共運輸服務詳情 港鐵： -屯馬綫將加密班次疏導離場觀眾； -過境旅客請注意，經大圍站接駁東鐵綫往羅湖站的最後一班列車將於晚上十時五十九分由宋皇臺站，以及十一時○一分由啟德站開出； 特別巴士路線： -宋皇臺道上落客區已安排11條特別巴士路線前往口岸及港九新界各主要地區； -過境旅客可乘坐第SP12號線往落馬洲（新田）公共運輸交匯處，轉乘落馬洲—皇崗過境穿梭巴士(皇巴)前往落馬洲/皇崗口岸；或第A25S號線在港珠澳大橋香港口岸轉乘港珠澳大橋穿梭巴士（金巴）前往澳門及珠海；及 的士： -啟德主場館的士上落客區（H閘外地面）開放供的士上客。由於離場人士較多，預期輪候時間會較長，請耐心輪候登車。 觀眾請留意場地廣播和「離場易」（easyleave.police.gov.hk）提供的實時資訊，以及經運輸署網頁（www.td.gov.hk）、「香港出行易」流動應用程式、電台和電視台發放的最新交通消息。
